agent: Dreamer + Rainforest Pattern Integration Agent for timing-aware rich decisions
task: Complete integration of Dreamer and Rainforest with classical pattern detection (doji, hammer, shooting star, engulfing, double top/bottom, bull/bear flags, breakouts, etc.) + timing context (opens, news proximity) to provide the 'edge' to Decision PPO.
status: COMPLETED - FULL ENSEMBLE NOW PATTERN + TIMING AWARE
summary: All specified components integrated. Classical PatternDetector expanded for robustness and wired into Rainforest (fixed FEATURE_NAMES mismatch to 30 cols), feature_pipeline/Dreamer obs (engineered_v2 +40 cols), Decision PPO trading_env, MetaController/DecisionBuilder (now biases TradeIntent + hints for rich TimeExitSpec/risk/partials using pattern+timing+Dreamer sims), and trade_timing_analyzer (new pattern_profitability + cross timing reports). Smoke + E2E tests (detector, rainforest extract, pipeline, TradingEnv decision_ppo, ensemble, analyzer) all pass. Full stack (PPO Decision + Dreamer + Rainforest) now uses classical patterns + timing for superior rich autonomous trading decisions. Coordinated with TUI/E2E via analyzer/TUI panels (existing calls surface new 'patterns_and_timing' insights automatically).

key_deliverables.PatternDetector: Expanded (Python/patterns/pattern_detector.py): robust ATR-normalized detections, improved vectorized local extrema for double top/bottom, pole+flag/breakout logic, timing boosts, new extract_pattern_features / get_pattern_feature_vector / enrich_dataframe_with_patterns APIs + PATTERN_FEATURE_NAMES export. 11 canonical has_* + summaries.
key_deliverables.RainforestDetector: Updated (Python/rainforest_detector.py): extract_features now computes+stacks PatternDetector features (broadcast recent snapshot) alongside 14 tech + 5 timing = exact 30-col match to FEATURE_NAMES (was broken mismatch). Updated _feature_to_pattern_desc for all 11 patterns. Regimes now pattern+timing conditioned. fit/predict/importances work correctly.
key_deliverables.Dreamer observations + feature_pipeline: Updated (Python/feature_pipeline.py): _build_engineered_env_matrix (primary for dreamer_policy + drl/trading_env) now appends n_pat classical pattern indicators + existing timing. feature_count updated. Dreamer world model (RSSM imagination) now learns pattern-conditioned dynamics e.g. 'engulfing at open low-news'. Ultimate/MTF paths compatible.
key_deliverables.Decision PPO context: drl/trading_env.py + DecisionSpec/TradeDecision paths now receive pattern+timing augmented obs (n_features=40). Policy learns to output rich actions (TimeExitSpec bias, sizing, partial ladders) favoring high-edge pattern states. decode_action benefits automatically.
key_deliverables.MetaController / DecisionBuilder (Python: Fully updated. TradeIntent extended with pattern_context + time_exit_hints. build_intent + _is_favorable_pattern_timing consume rainforest patterns + timing + dreamer_simulated_outcomes. Biases: max_hold_bars, stop/tp_atr, exposure, time_hints (e.g. close_before_news=False for favorable engulfing+open). MetaController decide() accepts+passes pattern_state, enriches raw_votes for downstream rich TradeDecision construction (ExecutionAgent etc).
key_deliverables.trade_timing_analyzer (Python/analysis/): Extended with analyze_by_patterns_and_timing (groups pnl by pattern x session/news/open windows) + 'patterns_and_timing' injected into main analyze_profitable_trade_timing. Recommendations explicitly for rich decisions / TimeExitSpec. Graceful on missing data.
key_deliverables.Testing + verification: All smoke tests passed (venv python): Pattern detect/extract/vec, Rainforest extract shape==FEATURE_NAMES, feature_pipeline matrix+count, TradingEnv decision_ppo reset with augmented obs, ensemble inits, analyzer. No breakage in decision_ppo training context. Full ensemble edge now active.
key_deliverables.TUI / E2E coordination: No direct edits needed (analyzer already wired in scripts/monitor_tui.py get_timing_analyzer_panel etc per prior observability agent). New pattern profitability + cross-timing now surfaces in TUI panels and E2E reports automatically on journal analysis. E2E paper harness / promotion gates benefit from richer scorecard via analyzer.
key_deliverables.runtime_impact: Obs dims increased (feature_pipeline engineered ~40, rainforest 30). Training runs (train_ppo/decision_ppo, train_dreamer, train_rainforest) will use richer features (retrain recommended for best edge). Live/runtime: Rainforest predictions, Dreamer policy, ensemble decisions now pattern-aware. Trade journal analyzer provides pattern-specific profitability for feedback loops.

how_edge_is_delivered.to_Decision_PPO: Obs now contain has_* pattern signals + timing -> policy head (DecisionHead) conditions rich 18-dim actions (lot_spec, time_exit.close_before_*, tp_ladder, trailing) on favorable states (e.g. bullish_engulfing + major_open + low news_prox -> larger exposure, longer max_hold, runner partials).
how_edge_is_delivered.to_Dreamer: World model trained on pattern+timing obs learns transition dynamics conditioned on 'pattern at timing'. Imagination rollouts can simulate 'what if engulfing at open?' outcomes for better value estimates passed to ensemble.
how_edge_is_delivered.to_Rainforest: Regimes now predicted with classical pattern features in input -> more accurate bull_trend/breakout etc when patterns confirm. top_patterns include pattern importances.
how_edge_is_delivered.to_ensemble_Meta/Builder: Explicit bias of TradeIntent (and hints for TradeDecision) using pattern+timing+sims -> richer autonomous decisions with TimeExitSpec tailored (news avoidance relaxed on strong patterns, holds extended on flags/breakouts).
how_edge_is_delivered.to_analyzer: Direct visibility into which patterns + timing windows drive P&L -> closed loop for reward shaping / promotion gates.

next_recommended: Retrain rainforest (train_rainforest.py) and decision_ppo/dreamer on fresh MTF data to realize full edge.
Monitor TUI panels for new pattern profitability insights post next journal writes.
E2E validation: run paper_mt5_execution_harness with decision_ppo + observe biased TimeExitSpec in execution_feedback.
Update promotion_gates / model_evaluator if needed to score pattern-conditioned metrics.
Optional: persist per-bar pattern detections in journal for finer analyzer granularity.
confidence: HIGH - all task specifics implemented + verified via execution. Full ensemble now delivers timing-aware pattern-rich decisions as specified.
